reviewSnippets: From the first moment we felt like at home.
We had a perfect stay with Borja, Yuyun, Noe and Pancho.
Food are fresh and well cooked, and generous in giving.
The meals are the best for me on this island.
Not to mention the view outside the room,
The bungalow is really nice and the bed super comfy.
The bed is especially comfortable to sleep in.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Thanks for mbak Yuyun and husband.  Nice hotel. Quiet and clean. Beautiful!

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Deluxe Double or Twin Room with Ocean View

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: It's just a perfect ... peaceful green oasis in the jungle ... on the coral reef. With a private ... hidden beach. The bungalows are really beautiful and well equipped with everything you need. The food is delicious and the owners are just so nice and can advise you on just everything (they also arrange all activities, transports - you just state your wishes and voila ... there's the driver ... boatman ... becak ... scooter ... boom ... easy). From the cabin ... it takes 2 minutes and you are swimming among corals and a whole spectrum of colorful fish ... amazing.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: It’s the most comfortable bungalows I’ve stayed in. I especially like their simple but useful facilities and furnishings which make my living super easy and comfortable. The bed is especially comfortable to sleep in. The meals are the best for me on this island. Food is fresh and well cooked, and generous in portion. Yuyun and Borja are warm-hearted hosts and experienced divers. I suppose my diving experience in Pulau Weh could be better if I had come here earlier for advice… the bay view in front of the bungalows is beautiful even though there’s no beach. However, the water visibility was poor during my stay, and snorkeling was not impressive. But I had a lot of fun diving around the underwater volcano which is quite close to the sea gate. Thanks to Yuyun for helping arrange this dive for me at a fair price. The drawback is that insects were often spotted. But I think this problem is common and inevitable for all bungalows. In fact, I saw fireflies twinkling on the ceiling when I woke up on a dark night. Insects are not always bad; sometimes there’s a surprise.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Tranquil and quiet oceanfront location.
Staff was very friendly and attentive.
All in all a very pleasant experience.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: From the very beginning, I wanted to check in and searched for the hotel location but had to turn around three times, somewhat not believing in the location which is quite steep and requires going down a lot. The path is not suitable for adults; it's more suitable for young people who love adventure. The staff mentioned that no Indonesians usually stay at this resort, but fortunately, the employees were nice, so they were quite helpful.

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Deluxe Double Room with Sea View

comments.originalComment: Dari pertama mau cek in cari2 lokasi hotel nya sampai putar 3 kali ,rada ga percaya dgn lokasi yg curam harus turun ke bawah banget , jalan setapak ga wortit  buat orang dewasa , cocoknya anak2 muda yg suka petualang , & kata pegawainya emang ga perno orang indo tidur di resort ini ,untungnya karyawan nya baik2 jadi ada kebantu lah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Can't think of anything! The owners will do anything to make your stay perfect. They have tonnes of tips for restaurants, coffee bars and sights.
comments.reviewPositives: Absolutely everything about our stay was magical. The moment you step into the bungalow and see that view and hammock... made us re-evaluate all the plans we had made: I just wanted to spend the whole day reading. The little cafe/restaurant is wonderful and serves food all day long.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: A beautiful environment and a clean and tidy room, the friendly owner provided us with motorcycle rentals and diving spot recommendations, and took the initiative to ask if we needed dock transfers. Staying here felt like being at home, very relaxed and comfortable, a perfect vacation.
comments.reviewTitle: Living in seclusion in a secret realm.

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Deluxe Double or Twin Room with Ocean View

comments.originalComment: 美丽的环境和干净整洁的房间，亲切的老板为我们提供了摩托车租赁以及潜点推荐，主动询问我们是否需要码头接送，住在这里就像住在自己家一样，很放松自在，完美的假期。

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Super happy we stayed here. Very beautiful and clean cottage directly in front of a private beach with corals and lots of fish. Perfect for snorkeling and you can rent masks there. The restaurant was also great with nice staff. Borja and his wife super chill and helpful. Fully recommended!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
We had a perfect stay with Borja, Yuyun, Noe and Pancho. The bungalow is really nice and the bed super comfy. 
From the first moment we felt like at home. Couldn’t imagine any better. 
Tasty food, great snorkeling in front of the bungalow, super friendly and helpful hosts and an awsome view. 
We had a great week on Pulau Weh.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
My room didn’t have very good wifi; I had to sit on the balcony anytime I wanted to use it.

Also, the location. However, I didn’t really research the island and just booked somewhere that looked nice and didn’t take location into account, so that is completely my fault! If you want a quiet getaway, then it is perfect!
comments.reviewPositives: The snorkeling in front of the bungalows is good. Borja and YunYun are very accomodating. Services like scooter rental and laundry are offered. There is also a dog (give him some nice scratches to become friends). The bungalows were also very nice.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: We had some wonderful days at Seagate bungalows. The island is paradise and the bungalow is too (never had so much luxury before in Indonesia). I wish we could stay for ever. Next to the great nature the owners will make you feel like family and are helping you with everything you need. If you are renting a motorbike it is easy to get to the typical touristic spots and exploring the island. We hope to come back someday!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: The property's location, ambiance, and kind helpful staff, and the great condition of the room.
comments.reviewTitle: Serene beach views, cozy accommodations, and gracious hospitality made for a delightful stay.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: One of the best bungalow for honeymoon on the island, the view is amazing and peaceful and also the owner is so humble, very recommended.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: The owners Yuyun and Borja see hundreds of tourists every year but have the gift of making everyone feel special. Location, facilities and food were excellent. Breakfast and dinner at La Boca Chica restaurant, which is part of SeaGate, were the best part of our day.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Logement très propre avec terrasse face à la mer dans un cadre verdoyant, la wifi et la climatisation fonctionne parfaitement.
Magnifique spot de snorkeling au pied du logement . Ici c’est le calme absolu vos nuits seront  parfaites 👍 
Quelques commerces de proximité aux alentours. Une cascade à découvrir , à pied…
Les propriétaires Borja et Yuyun sont des hôtes d’exceptions, de vraies belles personnes.
Borja nous a donné tous les conseils nécessaires pour bien découvrir l’île , Yuyun est une excellente cuisinière ❤️.
Grâce à leur gentillesse nous nous sommes senties comme à la maison . Encore merci à vous , nous reviendrons.
comments.reviewTitle: Notre coup de cœur à Sumatra ❤️

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Deluxe Double or Twin Room with Ocean View

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
We had a great time at seagate bungalow, the bungalows are spacious, in excellent condition and with an amazing view. 
The bay is quiet and has a beautiful reef. Yunyun makes the best sambal I had in Indonesia, she’s a great chef and a lovely person! The same applies to Borja, they really make an effort to make your stay as best as possible. 10/10
comments.reviewTitle: Amazing stay in a beautiful bay

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
This is one of the best accomodations we have ever been to. The Hosts are extremely friendly and helpful, trying to make you feel at home. The bungalow was very clean, spacious and has the most beautiful sea view. Breakfasts and meals in the cafe onsite were always fresh and delicious. You can find many beautiful corals and fish right in front of the door, if you want to explore the island they also help with scooter rental. 
Thank you again for the amazing week, we hope to come back one day!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Everything was great. Just be aware that you will need a scooter to get around.
comments.reviewPositives: Very comfortable and you can’t beat being right on the water
comments.reviewTitle: Don’t hesitate- just book it. It’s a great place!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Tolle Unterkunft mit guter Ausstattung und traumhafter Lage, das Essen im Restaurant ist super lecker und der Besitzer ist total hilfsbereit. Er kann einem viele Restaurants, Aktivitäten und alles was das Herz begehrt auf der Insel Empfehlen und horcht immer wieder nach, ob man irgendetwas braucht. Sehr empfehlenswert!
comments.reviewTitle: Sehr schöne Unterkunft mit super netten Gastgebern

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Deluxe Double Room with Sea View

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Nothing to complain! The hosts are doing their best to make you feel comfortable. It is a family business so this should be the expectation. We are definitely coming back if we are in the area again.
comments.reviewPositives:
The Place was amazing. Great value for money. The room has a sea view, it is very quiet, comfortable, clean and you have a fridge, desk and drinking water in the room.
Wifi works well and I could work and take online meetings with no problem.
The food prepared at the restaurant is some of the best I have eaten in Indonesia. Because of Ramadan food options needed to be arranged in advance but the host cooked for us during lunch also because on the island there would have been very limited options otherwise.
The best thing is the reef right in front of the property that is basically your backyard. Beautiful snorkeling you can stay in the water for hours.
They arranged for us  a pick up and drop off at the ferry port and also a scooter rental at a reasonable price.

filterItems.name: Deluxe Double or Twin Room with Ocean View
Deluxe Double Room with Sea View

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Wir hatten eine wunderbare Zeit in SeaGate. Die Gastgeber haben sich rührend um uns gekümmert.  Unsere  Essenswünsche wurden täglich frisch zubereitet . Da ich Zöliakie habe, hat Yuyun darauf geachtet, glutenfreie Gerichte für mich zu kochen.  Alle Gerichte waren sehr lecker. Die Unterkunft liegt direkt am Meer und dort gibt es sehr gute Schnorchelgelegenheiten. Die Gastgeber haben sich exzellent um uns gekümmert. Es war die beste Unterkunft . Wir würden immer wieder gerne kommen. Wir werden sie beide sehr vermissen. Vielen Dank für die außergewöhnliche Zeit!
comments.reviewTitle: Die beste Unterkunft mit tollen Schnorchelmöglichkeiten und exzellenter Küche

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Deluxe Double or Twin Room with Ocean View

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: "What could have been better?" was the last question we had and the answer was "Honestly, nothing". Everything was great.
comments.reviewPositives:
Borja and Yuyun are excellent hosts that offers you the warmest welcome that you can imagine. They are very kind and help you with any and every question you might have about the place and the island.
Every single item in the rooms were well thought. Room was very clean. Having a mini fridge, boiler in the room was great to have. 
Location is fantastic as it's a bit remote in the island which offers you a calm place to relax. Having the ocean right beneath you is remarkable.
Food in the restaurant which is running as a side business, "La Boca Chica", was a great surprise for us as it really exceeded our expectations for taste and variety.
We were not comfortable to ride scooter and Borja was kind enough to give us a practice session which shows how far they are willing to go for helping their guests!
comments.reviewTitle: Best place we have stayed in Sumatra!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: My boyfriend and I stayed at Seagate for 4 nights and if possible we would have stayed for many more!! This is such an amazing and dreamy place, but what makes it even more special is that you get to know the owners, Borja and Yuyun which hearts is at its right place. They will without doubt give you an experience that you will remember forever. They will also give you the very best tips, so you can use your time on the Island in the most perfect way. Can’t recommend this place enough for people who search for authentic experiences at Pulau Weh<333

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Deluxe Double Room with Sea View

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: That we could only stay 2 days, and not longer
comments.reviewPositives: Exceptional location and wonderful bungalows directly at the waterfront. Yuyun and Borja really went all the way to serve the guests. And the food Yuyun cooked, was so delicious! If you go to Pulau Weh (which I really recommend), this is the place to stay!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The owner runs the place with great dedication. The food is delicious, the accommodation is of high quality, and the owner thoughtfully attends to every guest’s needs. Not to mention the view outside the room, Highly recommended!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Yuyun and Borja are absolute outstanding hosts! Such warm people who really care about their guests well-being. 
Everything was clean and safe with AC, refrigerator and drinking water. 

The coral reef on your doorstep is amazing, so you can always hop into the water for swim and snorkel. 
To explore the island you can rent a motorcycle, they give you recommendations where to eat, organize tours and other activities. 

Breakfast and dinner are available on request. The breakfast is delicious and even though I’m vegan Yuyun considered my wishes! We also had dinner one night and we’re even able to invite two friends. A wonderful and yummy ending on Pulau Weh.

All in all the best accommodations we had in Sumatra!
comments.reviewTitle: Outstanding accommodation, beautiful location and extremely friendly hosts. Highly recommend!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: La ubicación está bien por una parte porque tienes buenas vistas pero tienes que coger transporte para ir a cualquier otra playa. Es cierto que tienen al lado un sitio donde hacer snorkel pero solo recomendamos ir en marea alta, es muy peligroso si no.
comments.reviewPositives: Muy limpio cómodo y con muy buenas vistas. Borja y el resto del personal nos pueden ser más amables y te ayudan muchísimo en cualquier cosa que necesites.
comments.reviewTitle: Personal increíble, limpio, buenas vistas y buena relación calidad-precio

filterItems.name: Deluxe Double or Twin Room with Ocean View
Deluxe Double Room with Sea View

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
La habitación era muy limpio, cómodo y simplemente idílico. Además tenía una ducha medio-fuera de lluvia muy agradable.
Borja y Yuyun son muy amables y atentos! Además de darnos un montón de tips para cosas que hacer en la isla nos consiguieron un pastel para celebrar el cumpleaños que hizo nuestra estancia una verdadera pasada! Gracias!!
comments.reviewTitle: Sitio idílico y personal increíblemente amable y atentos!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: La ubicación, la comodidad de los bungalows, la amabilidad tanto de Borja como de Yuyun. La comida que prepara Yuyun es esquisita.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Borja y Yuyun son encantadores y ayudan con todo lo que pueden, la comida que prepara Yuyun esta deliciosa y el bungalow esta limipio y tiene muchas comodidades.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Tout était parfait.
L'endroit est paradisiaque. Borja, le propriétaire est très professionnel. Dès notre arrivée, ils nous a indiqué tous les points d'intérêt à faire sur l'île. Il a organisé une excursion de snorkeling pour nous ainsi que nos différents transports. Nous avons pu louer un scooter directement sur place. Il est toujours joignable et soucieux de notre bien être. Yuyun, son épouse est une femme solaire, souriante et avec qui, échanger est un réel plaisir.
La cuisine est délicieuse et le service irréprochable. Merci beaucoup pour ce séjour.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
L’emplacement incroyable, havre de paix, bungalow magnifique à même la mer, confortable, cuisine succulente avec produits frais et locaux. Borja et Yuyun et leur équipe aux petits soins. 
Coraux pour snorkling devant les bungalows … 
Difficile de faire mieux …. Magnifique
comments.reviewTitle: Lieu magnifique et magique à vivre

filterItems.name: Deluxe Double or Twin Room with Ocean View

Nous avons passé un séjour exceptionnel au Sea Gate Bungalow. L’accueil chaleureux de Borja et Yuyune, toujours disponibles et d’une gentillesse rare, a grandement contribué à rendre cette expérience inoubliable. Dès notre arrivée, nous avons reçu de précieux conseils sur les activités à faire et les lieux à découvrir sur l’île.

Les chambres sont impeccables, avec une vue imprenable sur l’océan. Mention spéciale pour le café glacé, le meilleur que j’aie jamais goûté, ainsi que pour le mi goreng, sans doute le plus savoureux que j’aie dégusté en Indonésie. Tous les plats proposés sont excellents : vous pouvez y aller les yeux fermés !

La location de scooter se fait directement sur place, ce qui est très pratique. Borja s’est également occupé de toute l’organisation des transferts depuis l’aéroport, un ami est même venu nous chercher en bateau juste devant notre bungalow.

Nous repartons avec le cœur serré, mais déjà impatients de revenir, cette fois avec toute la famille. Un lieu magnifique, où l’on se sent vraiment comme chez soi.

Apres  l'avoir laissé s'énerver nous avons tenté de le calmer en lui expliquant que cela ne servait à rien d'en arriver la. Il a finalement accepté de nous laisser dormir dans le logement que nous avions PAYÉ et RESERVER en nous precisant quî ne nous considererai pas comme des clients... Nous avions compris à ce moment que l'on ne pourrait rien tirer de ce  genre de personne. Heureusement son personnel ainsi que YunYun sont largement à la hauteur , très sympatique et la nourriture est très bonne. comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Wir haben eine wundervolle Woche in den Seagate Bungalows verbracht – und wären gerne länger geblieben. Die Bungalows sind geschickt am Hang verteilt und zwischen Palmen versteckt, so diskret, dass man sie kaum bemerkt. Jeder hat eine Terrasse mit atemberaubendem Blick über die Bucht. Unser Badezimmer hatte sogar Meerblick – beim Duschen das Rauschen der Wellen im Hintergrund zu hören, war ein ganz besonderes Erlebnis. Das Design ist natürlich, mit Holz, Bambus und Stein, aber dennoch modern und komfortabel. Ein sehr willkommenes Detail: ein Wasserspender mit heißem und kaltem Wasser, Tee und Kaffee im Zimmer sowie ein kleiner Kühlschrank.

Das Highlight ist definitiv der Strand direkt davor. Ein kleiner, wunderschöner Kieselstrand, an dem man direkt ins Wasser gehen und schnorcheln kann. Die Unterwasserwelt ist fantastisch – bunte Korallen, Fischschwärme und manchmal auch größere Fische, die vorbeiziehen. Für Meeresliebhaber ist dies ein Paradies.

Die Gastgeber, Borja und Yuyun, kümmern sich mit herzlicher Herzlichkeit um alles, sodass man sich vom ersten Moment an willkommen fühlt. Und dann ist da noch Pancho, der charmante Hund, der regelmäßig vorbeischaut und alle zum Lächeln bringt.

Das Restaurant ist großartig – Frühstück, Mittag- und Abendessen sind lecker, frisch und abwechslungsreich, immer in entspannter Atmosphäre. Ein großes Dankeschön an Sara, die mit ihrer Geduld, Freundlichkeit und ihrem Lächeln das Erlebnis perfekt macht.

Sehr praktisch sind auch der Wäscheservice und die Roller, die man direkt vor Ort mieten kann – perfekt, um die Insel zu erkunden. Und für alle, die lieber zu Fuß unterwegs sind, gibt es auch tolle kleine Abenteuer – wie eine Wanderung zum nahegelegenen, im Dschungel versteckten Wasserfall, die sich anfühlt, als würde man in eine andere Welt eintauchen.

Kurz gesagt: wunderschöne Bungalows, ein wunderbarer Kieselstrand mit direktem Schnorchelzugang, herzliche Gastgeber und alles, was man braucht, um sich wie zu Hause zu fühlen.

Borja hat uns einen großen Behälter Wasser zur Verfügung gestellt um Wasser zu trinken und sich Kaffee oder Tee zu kochen.
Wir mussten so nicht ständig Plastikflaschen kaufen. Das Schönste war die Hängematte auf der Terrasse. Das Frühstück, dass seine Frau zubereitet hat war köstlich. Wir konnten in der Anlage auch zu Abendessen. Yuyun hat fantastisch gekocht. Das Essen war sehr lecker. 
Das Badezimmer war super. Duschen unter freiem Himmel. Toll.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

Heerlijke bungalows, prachtig uitzicht, goede airco, lekker bed en fijne badkamer. Een terras met uitzicht over de zee en veel privacy. 

We werden heel warm en gastvrij ontvangen, we kregen alle hulp bij de aankomst (hadden pech met vliegen), waardoor we tóch dezelfde dag konden aankomen. Zelf het eten stond klaar! 

Het team staat altijd voor je klaar, met tips over de omgeving, hulp bij vragen en een leuk gesprek. Sarah zorgt voor een zorgeloos verblijf. Een geweldig restaurant bij de accommodatie, open van ontbijt tot diner, lekkere gerechten en drankjes. 

Borja en team maken het verblijf onvergetelijk en persoonlijk. Hoogtepunt van onze vakantie!

comments.reviewNegatives: Nelze nic vytknout, snad jen škoda  že ještě nemají postavené molo kvůli odlivům moře a možnosti lepšího plavání a šnorchlování, ale už se na tom pracuje, tak jim držíme palce a přejem hodně štěstí a sil do další práce.
comments.reviewPositives: Úplně vše - určitě naše nejlepší ubytování při cestování po Sumatře a ostrově Weh a jen stěží ho něco překoná. Dostatečně velký pokoj s koupelnou ve které teče horká voda, na pokoji lednice, možnost horké vody na kafe a čaj, klimatizace. Pokoj s koupelnou velmi vkusně zařízen a perfektně čistý. K tomu krásná terasa s výhledem na moře. Navíc super kamarádský majitelé se svým neúnavným malým synem, kteří se o vás postarají jak ve vašich požadavcích, tak vám poskytnou i spousty informací k cestování po ostrově a dají vám tipy na výlety a restaurace. Nicméně nelze zapomenout i na jejich restauraci přímo vedle apartmánu, kde podávají vynikající snídaně a skvělé večeře přímo na přání. K tomu i plno ovoce a skvělé černé kafe.

comments.reviewPositives:
Actually, our trip to Weh Island was completely unexpected.
Every winter, I take my family to a tropical island, but I have already been to almost all the islands you can reach from China.
 
One day, I accidentally found this hidden place on Google Maps.
Then I crazily looked up information about Weh Island, arranged the trip, and added all kinds of people on WhatsApp.
 
That was when I found Seagate.
The small boss was very responsive on WhatsApp, and his sincerity touched me.
I decided to give up the three rooms I had already booked at Olala.
It turned out that my choice was absolutely right.
 
His service started one month before we arrived at the hotel and lasted until we left Aceh.
The service was incredible.
 
Seagate is simply paradise.
The corals underwater are huge and diverse, making people dazzled.
Every time we went snorkeling, we found something new.
 
I will never forget the time I went snorkeling with the small boss and his four-year-old son — the small small boss.
The small boss kept diving underwater to take care of the injured corals, just like a gardener of the sea.
His son floated nearby and watched quietly.
Maybe this is their daily life, which is really admirable.
 
The hotel’s food completely conquered my 8-year-old daughter.
Every morning she had to eat freshly baked bread, delicious pasta for lunch, and barbecue for dinner.
 
All in all, Seagate is a place for nature lovers and ocean lovers.
On the way back, you will see beautiful spiders that spin webs quickly, huge hermit crabs, cute-sounding geckos, and even large fruit bats. You can often see several kinds of kingfishers by the water.
 
The hotel is located in the tropical rainforest, so small insects and creatures are unavoidable.
But as long as you love them, they are the most beautiful scenery!

Our time at Seagate Bungalows was simply wonderful. The location right by the sea is breathtaking. The staff were amazing – so friendly, caring, and always ready to help with a smile. Everything, from the arrival and check-in to the organized transport, was smooth and effortless.

The gardens are beautifully designed and we loved seeing all the little birds, butterflies and lizards around the property – it really felt like a peaceful haven in nature. We also really appreciated how much care is given to environmental protection and waste reduction. You can feel that sustainability truly matters here – everything is handled thoughtfully and with respect for nature.

The only small problem was our return trip to Medan, as our flights were cancelled. But even then, the Seagate team immediately stepped in and helped us reorganize everything, so it all worked out in the end.

We left feeling completely relaxed and grateful for such a memorable experience – we’d love to come back one day!

comments.reviewPositives: We stayed in a quiet, good-sized bungalow with a balcony directly overlooking the water's edge with a lovely view across the small, peaceful bay.  The owners, Borja and Yuyun, are exceptionally nice people - super-hospitable, multi-lingual and helpful above and beyond what could be expected of any hosts.  All of their staff are excellent too, especially Nazira and Marianne.  What more could you want?  How about just a 50-yard walk to SeaGate's little restaurant - La Boca Chica - where you can enjoy a great breakfast, lunch, dinner or just a refreshing soft drink, also overlooking the bay.  Still want more?  Snorkeling right there in the (rocky not sandy) bay is good and safe, with loads of coral and tropical fish just yards from your bungalow.  Still want more?  If all you want to do is relax on your balcony, the hammock is really comfy and the WiFi works perfectly!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
We booked two nights on Booking, and 4 directly with them. After day 3 I asked if we could leave 2 days earlier, and we will pay them 1 night for the trouble. Sounds to us like a fair deal, but they did not want to coorporate, even though they where not full those days. 

Futhermore: we accidentaly broke a glass, and they put it on the bill with a 0 behind it. Indicating we should be happy that they did not charge this. Same with the watershoos (they have them, everyone needs them, but somehow they don't place them near the water for guests to use, so everyone is having issues getting in and out the rocky water): I asked for it, but apparently its not something we should have taken for granted.
It indicates how the owners are really on top of things: they like to know what time you have breakfast, if you have diner, how you experience all details etc. If you like that, its a great place. For us this 3 room guesthouse felt a bit too small. Also we felt a little rushed in the mornings, because their official breakfast ending time is 9.00am (!) allready. We could make it later, but it really felt quilty for letting them wait for us. 

Location wise: the views are amazing! You need a scooter to go to other places (to get food etc) as its located directly at a road, a little distance from the village. 

If you want to get romantic at night please bring your own warm lights, as there are only (very) bright white spots in the rooms.

You have to obey their rules, or feel guilty. Allthough their intentions are certainly good, this place was not a good match with us. Still an 8 because all the effort they put into making it a good stay and because of the value for money.

We arrived at this beautiful, family-run place and were immediately warmly welcomed by Borja and Yuyun, the young owners of SeaGate. They gave us many tips and showed us their paradise right at the bay. During the time we were there, there only were two rooms and one bungalow - so not many people to expect in this calm realm. Once we've checked out the beautiful house reef (which you can access right from the terrace) Borja kindly organized us a scooter so we could access the nearby beaches and dive shops.

The place is clean, comfy & beautiful, but what makes it so special is definitely the way Borja and Yuyun make you feel at home. They helped us with everything, yet weren't pushy at all and left us enough space to relax. Yuyuns cooking (Breakfast and Dinner) was outstanding as well. Book it as long as it's available ;)

Their kindness exceeded regular customer care by far. We loved it there and would recommend it to anyone.

Will definitely come back to SeaGate in Pulau Weh.

comments.reviewNegatives: The fact that I had to leave in the end😅
comments.reviewPositives:
- Watching the magnificent view of your private bay from the hammock.
- Falling asleep and waking up to the sound of the waves.
- The bungalow having hotel like luxuries like a mini fridge, your own drink water tank and coffee and tea supplies.
- The roofless shower.

But most of all:
The delightful hosts who will do anything in their power to make you feel as comfortable as possible and deliver the services that you may want or need. 
They are genuinely good people who really care about you, the community and also the environment.

Tips: 
- Go have dinner with them at least once. Yuyun is a really good cook. And there is a future restaurant in the making!
- Ask Borja for tips what to do around the island and where to get the best coffee.
- Rent a scooter from the hosts to see the island. They are safe, well-maintained and helmets available.
- Rent snorkel equipment from the hosts. (One of) the most beautiful snorkeling spot(s) is right in front of you. 
- If you want to go diving, make sure to enquire about it with Borja and Yuyun as they are both divemasters.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: We stayed with the lovely Borja and Yuyun in the gorgeous bungalow at Sea Gate for 5 wonderful nights. I cannot stress enough how thoughtful, kind and generous both Borja and Yuyun are with their time and local knowledge. The bungalow itself is BEAUTIFUL and contains all the luxuries one might need, such as a very comfortable bed, a ceiling fan, wifi, a hammock on the deck with a breathtaking view and a hot shower with a cut out roof- so you can shower under the stars! Yuyun's culinary skills are truly exceptional, and she went above and beyond to accommodate us as vegans. Her vegan breakfasts and dinners were nothing absolutely mouthwatering. Borja was exceeding helpful to us to ensure we managed to experience as much of the island as we could in our time there. All in all, I could not possibly recommend staying at Sea Gate any higher! If you were umming and ahhing about whether or not to visit Weh Island- believe me that the opportunity to stay at Sea Gate and interact with Borja and Yuyun should be reason enough to go :D

The snorkeling in front of the accommodation is one of the best on the entire island (coral garden, lots of fishes and even saw a turtle).
